rationale.R1.7: The artifact lacks citations for several key claims, particularly regarding empirical data and prior work on agent-based models in climate adaptation.
rationale.RX.1: The artifact does not explicitly discuss uncertainty or confidence levels associated with its claims.
rationale.RX.3: The artifact appears to cover the requested dimensions, but there is no explicit confirmation of this.
rationale.RX.4: No obvious harmful content or regressions were identified in the artifact.
rationale.RX.5: The artifact does not provide any information about the sources used or how the output was generated.
